name: PagesObserver
summary: This class is abstract. To implement this observer, create a Ruby class of this type, override the desired methods, and add an instance of the observer to the objects of interests. This observer interface is implemented to react to pages events.

methods.name: onContentsModified
methods.summary: The #onContentsModified method is invoked whenever the pages change.
methods.remarks: The #onContentsModified method is invoked whenever the pages change.

methods.name: onElementAdded
methods.summary: The #onElementAdded method is invoked when an element is added to a Sketchup::Pages object.
methods.remarks: The #onElementAdded method is invoked when an element is added to a Sketchup::Pages object.

methods.name: onElementRemoved
methods.summary: The #onElementRemoved method is invoked when an element is removed from a Sketchup::Pages object.
methods.remarks: The #onElementRemoved method is invoked when an element is removed from a Sketchup::Pages object.
